summary: Material anonymisation/egress chokepoint violations remain in the named scope.

findings.invariant: (1) NO model-bound payload reaches the provider without passing through anonymize() first - every chokepoint entry (the 4 entries + the bridge provider path via proxyGatewayMessages) tokenizes the outbound body BEFORE the transport call
findings.title: runOneShot forwards raw image payloads to the provider transport
findings.recommendation: Do not pass opts.images directly to transport.oneShot. Either route image attachments through a mandatory redaction/anonymisation path before transport, or fail closed when image payloads are present and cannot be anonymised.

findings.invariant: (4) detection runs on the FULL text each turn (no delta shortcut that could let an undetected span through) and fail-closed (a payload the mandatory detectors cannot process is refused, not forwarded un-tokenized)
findings.title: Messages request detection runs per string leaf, not over the full turn text
findings.recommendation: Collect the full model-bound turn text, run mandatory detection once over that full text, and apply replacements back to the original structure with positional mapping. Refuse bodies that cannot be mapped safely.

findings.invariant: (2) the vault (token->value map) is NEVER persisted to disk and NEVER included in any payload to the provider, and is cleared at session end
findings.title: Ephemeral vaults are not cleared when a provider call errors before the normal cleanup point
findings.recommendation: Move endSession for ephemeral handles into finally blocks around each transport path after a vault is opened, including runAgent, runOneShot, completeFast, and proxyGatewayMessages error/abort paths.

findings.invariant: (5) de-tokenization on the response covers tool_use argument blocks + streaming straddle
findings.title: tool_use argument de-tokenization can silently return tokenized placeholders
findings.recommendation: Replace detokJson with recursive string-leaf de-tokenization instead of JSON.stringify plus raw replacement. Do not fall back to returning the tokenized value when de-tokenization fails.

findings.invariant: (6) the org deny-list is org-scoped-encrypted and never sent to the provider
findings.title: Plaintext deny-list rulesets are accepted and used without org-scoped ciphertext
findings.recommendation: Remove the plaintext denyList fallback from production rulesets and require denyListCiphertext decrypted with decryptForScope(ruleset.orgId); keep any plaintext seam test-only if needed.
